# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
|---------|--------------------|
| main    | :white_check_mark: |
| < main  | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please report security issues privately via GitHub's "Report a vulnerability" tab
in the Security section of this repository. Do not file public issues for
security-sensitive bugs.

We aim to acknowledge reports within 72 hours and to provide a remediation plan
within 7 days for confirmed issues.
